en_title: How to Play the Tomb Raider Games in Chronological Order
cn_title: 《古墓丽影》全系列时间线游玩指南
subtitle: 劳拉的考古编年史
opus_summary: 《古墓丽影》系列已有20款游戏，分为三条独立时间线。随着两款新作《古墓丽影：催化剂》和《古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗产》公布，IGN整理了全系列时间线。建议新玩家从2013年重启作开始。亚马逊真人剧集也已开拍，由索菲·特纳饰演劳拉。

paragraphs.en: Tomb Raider has a chartered history, with Lara Croft delving into ruins and tombs all over the world. Overcoming any and all obstacles set in her path, Lara has elevated herself into an exclusive and lauded pantheon of iconic video game protagonists.
paragraphs.cn: 《古墓丽影》系列有着悠久的历史，劳拉·克劳馥深入世界各地的遗迹与古墓。她克服了前进道路上的一切障碍，跻身备受赞誉的经典游戏主角殿堂。

paragraphs.en: Now that we know that not one but two Tomb Raider games are on the way, we’ve created a chronological list of every game released so far. There's never a bad time to start (or restart) your spelunking adventures from the very beginning.
paragraphs.cn: 如今我们得知，不仅有《古墓丽影》新作，而且是两款新作即将到来，因此我们整理了迄今为止所有已发售游戏的时间线列表。任何时候开始（或重新开始）你的洞穴探险之旅都不算晚。

paragraphs.en: A total of 20 Tomb Raider games have been released. These games are split over three different timelines, each distinct from one another, offering different plotlines and a slightly different spin on Lara and her supporting cast.
paragraphs.cn: 《古墓丽影》系列共发售了20款游戏。这些游戏分为三条不同的时间线，每条时间线都各具特色，提供了不同的剧情线以及对劳拉及其配角阵容的略有不同的诠释。

paragraphs.en: 14 of these games have been released for home consoles, 6 also supported handheld portable consoles, and 6 were supported on mobile devices. Tomb Raider: The Prophecy, Lara Croft and the Guardian of Light, Lara Croft and the Temple of Osiris, Lara Croft Go, Lara Croft: Relic Run, and Tomb Raider Reloaded are all stand-alone titles, and therefore will not be included on these lists.
paragraphs.cn: 其中14款游戏登陆了家用主机，6款也支持掌机，6款支持移动设备。《古墓丽影：预言》、《劳拉与光之守护者》、《劳拉与奥西里斯神庙》、《劳拉Go》、《劳拉：遗迹逃亡》和《古墓丽影：重装上阵》均为独立作品，因此不包含在这些列表中。

paragraphs.en: If you're coming to the franchise for the first time in 2025, we recommend starting with the 2013 Tomb Raider reboot. The first entry in the "Survivor" trilogy sets the stage for Lara Croft's most recent series of expeditions that runs through the latest mainline game, 2018's Shadow of the Tomb Raider.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你在2025年首次接触这个系列，我们建议从2013年的《古墓丽影》重启作开始。这部「幸存者」三部曲的首部作品为劳拉·克劳馥最近的系列探险奠定了基础，一直延续到最新主线作品——2018年的《古墓丽影：暗影》。

paragraphs.en: If you're hoping to take a chronological journey through all of the Tomb Raider games, it's important to note that there are actually 3 different timelines you can play through.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你希望按时间顺序体验所有《古墓丽影》游戏，需要注意的是，实际上有3条不同的时间线可供游玩。

paragraphs.en: The first ever Tomb Raider title centred around Lara being hired by businesswoman Jacquelin Natla to find a mysterious artefact called the Scion of Atlantis. After finding all three fragments of the Scion scattered around the globe, Lara is betrayed by Natla and must face off against her on a volcanic island filled with monsters.
paragraphs.cn: 首款《古墓丽影》游戏围绕劳拉受女商人杰奎琳·纳特拉雇佣，寻找一件名为「亚特兰蒂斯之种」的神秘神器展开。在找到散落全球的三块碎片后，劳拉遭到纳特拉背叛，必须在一个充满怪物的火山岛上与她一决高下。

paragraphs.en: A Game Boy Color exclusive sequel to the Game Boy Color version of the original Tomb Raider, this adventure sees Lara tracking down a mystical sword and attempting to destroy it before the long-dead Madame Paveau can resurrect from the underworld and use her dark magic to subjugate the world.
paragraphs.cn: 这是初代《古墓丽影》Game Boy Color版的独占续作，劳拉追踪一把神秘之剑，试图在早已死去的帕沃夫人从冥界复活并用黑暗魔法征服世界之前将其摧毁。

paragraphs.en: This time Lara is on the hunt for the Dagger of Xian, a magical weapon once used by the Emperors of China. A cult leader by the name of Marco Bartoli who is also seeking the dagger for it’s magical ability to turn the owner into a dragon.
paragraphs.cn: 这一次，劳拉追寻的是「西安匕首」，一件曾为中国皇帝所用的魔法武器。一个名为马可·巴尔托利的邪教领袖也在寻找这把匕首，因为它拥有将持有者变成龙的魔力。

paragraphs.en: In the third mainline installment of the original saga, Lara sets out to find the Infada Stone, one of four crystalline artefacts crafted thousands of years ago from the remnants of a meteorite. Realising the nefarious Dr. Willard is aiming to use the statues to speed up the evolutionary process; she sets out to find the remaining three artefacts before the entire planet is mutated.
paragraphs.cn: 在原始传奇的第三部主线作品中，劳拉出发寻找「印加达之石」，这是数千年前用陨石残骸制成的四件水晶神器之一。在意识到邪恶的威拉德博士企图利用这些雕像加速进化过程后，她必须在整个星球发生变异之前找到其余三件神器。

paragraphs.en: In The Last Revelation, the Egyptian god of chaos Set is unknowingly released by Lara as she explores a tomb in Egypt. With Set and his forces wreaking havoc on Cairo, Lara is assisted by Semerkhet and strives to summon the god Horus who is the last hope of quelling this world-ending threat.
paragraphs.cn: 在《古墓丽影：最后的启示》中，劳拉在探索埃及一座古墓时无意中释放了埃及混沌之神赛特。赛特及其军队在开罗肆虐，劳拉在塞梅尔赫特的帮助下，努力召唤荷鲁斯神——这是平息这场灭世威胁的最后希望。

paragraphs.en: After the ambiguous ending of The Last Revelation, Winston the butler and other friends of Lara recount tales of her historic adventures to commemorate her. Delving through the catacombs of Rome, fighting through a Russian naval submarine, and exploring an island haunted by demonic forces, the titular Chronicles set in stone how well travelled and skilled Lara is, but is she really gone?
paragraphs.cn: 在《最后的启示》模棱两可的结局之后，管家温斯顿和劳拉的其他朋友讲述了她过去的冒险故事以纪念她。深入罗马地下墓穴、在俄罗斯海军潜艇中战斗、探索被恶魔力量笼罩的岛屿——这部名为《历代记》的作品奠定了劳拉见多识广、技艺高超的形象，但她真的消失了吗？

paragraphs.en: Framed for the murder of her former mentor, Werner Von Croy, Lara explores Paris and Prague in an attempt to clear her name and solve the murder. The last survivor of the Lux Veritatis Society, Kurtis Trent, is stalking Lara and is hiding a deep dark secret about his true nature.
paragraphs.cn: 劳拉被诬陷谋杀前导师沃纳·冯·克罗伊，她前往巴黎和布拉格调查，试图洗清罪名并破案。光明会最后一位幸存者库尔蒂斯·特伦特正在跟踪劳拉，他隐藏着一个关于自己真实身份的黑暗秘密。

paragraphs.en: A remake of the original Tomb Raider title from 1996, this game again sees Lara questing to find the Scion of Atlantis. With redesigned puzzles and physics, there was a shift from item collection and pulling switches (both prevalent in the original title), to physics-based puzzles and environmental set pieces.
paragraphs.cn: 这是1996年初代《古墓丽影》的重制版，劳拉再次踏上寻找亚特兰蒂斯之种的旅程。重新设计的谜题和物理引擎使游戏从原版中常见的收集物品和拉动开关，转向基于物理的谜题和环境场景。

paragraphs.en: This title acts as a reboot and reimagining of the origins of Lara, as she races across the world in search of the mythical sword Excalibur, desperate to find it before her former friend Amanda Evert can beat her to the punch.
paragraphs.cn: 本作是对劳拉起源的重启与重塑，她奔走于世界各地寻找传说中的神剑「王者之剑」，迫切希望在前朋友阿曼达·埃弗特抢先一步之前找到它。

paragraphs.en: The third installment in the Legend trilogy, Underworld sees Lara searching for Mjolnir, which acts as an ancient key to Helheim, the realm of the dead. Exploring the ruins of various cultures and mythological underworlds, Lara once again confronts the villainous Natla who is searching for Mjolnir herself.
paragraphs.cn: 作为传奇三部曲的第三部，《古墓丽影：地下世界》中劳拉寻找雷神之锤，它是通往死亡之国海姆冥界的古老钥匙。在探索各种文化遗迹和神话中的地下世界时，劳拉再次与同样在寻找雷神之锤的恶棍纳特拉对峙。

paragraphs.en: In a new, grittier take on Lara Croft, her first expedition to find the lost kingdom of Yamatai goes awry and she becomes stranded on an isolated and hostile island. Facing off against the Solarii Brotherhood cult, Lara must stop the Ascension ritual from proceeding and also prevent a successor from being chosen for the bloodthirsty Sun Queen of legend.
paragraphs.cn: 在全新、更写实的劳拉·克劳馥形象中，她寻找邪马台失落王国的首次探险出了差错，被困在一个与世隔绝且充满敌意的岛屿上。面对太阳兄弟会邪教，劳拉必须阻止升天仪式的进行，并防止传说中的嗜血太阳女王选出继任者。

paragraphs.en: Rise of the Tomb Raider has Lara exploring Siberia for the legendary city of Kitezh whilst battling Trinity, the paramilitary organization that continually crosses paths and butts heads with Lara. As they both sprint to rediscover Kitezh, will the legendary immortal guardians of the kingdom, the Deathless Ones, reveal themselves to be much more than just a myth?
paragraphs.cn: 《古墓丽影：崛起》中，劳拉在西伯利亚探索传说中的基特城，同时与不断与她交锋的准军事组织「圣三一」作战。当双方竞相重新发现基特城时，传说中的王国不朽守护者「不死军团」是否会证明自己远非神话？

paragraphs.en: The third and final installment in the Survivor Trilogy, Shadow of the Tomb Raider has Lara trekking through the Americas to find the city of Paititi before a Mayan apocalypse consumes the entire planet. With the monstrous Yaaxii and the ever present Trinity on her back, will she succeed before it’s too late?
paragraphs.cn: 作为幸存者三部曲的第三部也是最终章，《古墓丽影：暗影》中劳拉穿越美洲寻找帕伊提提城，赶在玛雅末日吞噬整个星球之前。在怪物亚克西和始终存在的圣三一的追击下，她能及时成功吗？

paragraphs.en: Crystal Dynamics confirmed a brand new Tomb Raider game was in development way back in 2022. We now know this game is Tomb Raider: Catalyst , a new journey built in Unreal Engine 5 and set to be published by Amazon Games in 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 水晶动力早在2022年就确认了一款全新的《古墓丽影》游戏正在开发中。我们现在知道这款游戏是《古墓丽影：催化剂》，一部使用Unreal Engine 5打造的全新旅程，计划由亚马逊游戏于2027年发行。

paragraphs.en: That's not all, though. The Game Awards also included the announcement of Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantic, a 'reimagining' of the original Tomb Raider game set to be released on February 10, 2027 . Yes, the acrobatics are back.
paragraphs.cn: 不过还不止这些。TGA颁奖典礼还公布了《古墓丽影：亚特兰蒂斯遗产》，这是对初代《古墓丽影》的「重新构想」，将于2027年2月10日发售。没错，那些高难度动作又回来了。

paragraphs.en: You won't have to wait long to see more Lara on your TV screen, either - Amazon's live action Tomb Raider series has entered production. Phoebe Waller-Bridge is on board as writer and executive producter, while Game of Thrones alum Sophie Turner is slated for the titular role . I think it's safe to say it's the season of Tomb Raider.
paragraphs.cn: 你也不用等太久就能在电视屏幕上看到更多劳拉——亚马逊的真人版《古墓丽影》剧集已投入制作。菲比·沃勒-布里奇担任编剧和执行制片人，而《权力的游戏》校友索菲·特纳将饰演主角劳拉。我想可以安全地说，现在是《古墓丽影》的季节。

paragraphs.en: Samuel (Sam) Heaney is a freelance guides writer at IGN and Minecraft expert. He's a typical Brit who loves cups of tea and gin and tonics. Oh, and he's also a huge Marvel nerd. You can find him on Twitter @SamHeaney.
paragraphs.cn: Samuel (Sam) Heaney 是 IGN 的自由攻略作者和《我的世界》专家。他是个典型的英国人，喜欢喝茶和金汤力。哦，他还是个超级漫威迷。你可以在 Twitter @SamHeaney 上找到他。
